case_title: WILSON, JUDY A. VS LOCAL 790 SEIU et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOCAL 790 SEIU CHAPMAN, JET     BUSINESS REPRESENTATIVE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT DOES NOT HAVE JURISDICTION IN THIS MATTER, PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 3541.5 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO JET CHAPMAN BUSINESS REP. SEIU LOCAL 790-DEFENDANT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WILSON, JUDY A. AS TO DEFENDANT LOCAL 790 SEIU CHAPMAN, JET     BUSINESS REPRESENTATIVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION TO DISMISS COMPLAINT; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT THEREOF FILED BY JET CHAPMAN BUS.REP. OF SEIU 790.
NOTICE RE CHALLENGE OF VENUE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
